title: Maven Java Compiler Version
summary: This tutorial explains how to set the Java compiler version to compile your project with, inside the POM file for the project. The tutorial now explains how to enable the preview features in Java 12 and 13.
content: This tutorial explains how to set the Java compiler version to compile your project with, inside the POM file for the project. The tutorial now explains how to enable the preview features in Java 12 and 13.
